widget.name: Pwb Combo Box
widget.description: Premium highly customizable ComboBox with search autocomplete, multi-select tag support, and WCAG compliance.

property.caption: Data Source Mode
property.description: Choose whether options come from an Association/Datasource, or directly from an Enumeration/Boolean Attribute.

property.caption: Attribute
property.description: Attribute to store or read the selected value (supports String, Integer, Enum, or Boolean depending on Type)

property.caption: Selected Association
property.description: Reference (for Single Mode) or ReferenceSet (for Multi Mode) association to store selected object(s)

property.caption: Delimiter (Multi Mode String Only)
property.description: Delimiter character used to separate values in Multi Mode String attribute (e.g. , or ; or |)

property.caption: Max Visible Tags
property.description: Maximum number of selected tags shown on input before collapsing. Set to 0 to show all.

property.caption: Options Source
property.description: Dynamic list of options to display in the dropdown

property.caption: Option Label
property.description: Expression to display text for each option item (e.g. $currentObject/AttributeName)

property.caption: Option Detail (Subtitle)
property.description: Optional secondary text displayed below the option label (e.g. Email under Name)

property.caption: Option Group Category
property.description: Optional expression to group option items by a category name (e.g. $currentObject/Category)

property.caption: Option Image URL
property.description: Optional expression to display a circular avatar image thumbnail (e.g. $currentObject/AvatarUrl)

property.caption: Selected Option Label
property.description: Optional expression to display a custom label format ONLY when the option is selected (e.g., a shorter tag name). If empty, Option Label is used.

property.caption: Enable Grouping
property.description: Enable or disable grouping of options by the Option Group Category expression

property.caption: Yes / True Display Label
property.description: Text to display for the 'True' option (e.g. Yes, Active, Enabled)

property.caption: No / False Display Label
property.description: Text to display for the 'False' option (e.g. No, Inactive, Disabled)

property.caption: Output Value Format
property.description: Specify whether selected value is saved as a real Boolean (true/false) or custom String Key (e.g. 'active'/'inactive'). Ensure selectedAttribute type matches.

property.caption: True String Value Key
property.description: The string key stored in database when selected 'True' (e.g. 'active', 'Y')

property.caption: False String Value Key
property.description: The string key stored in database when selected 'False' (e.g. 'inactive', 'N')

property.caption: Selection Mode
property.description: Choose single selection or multi-select tag mode

property.caption: Single Select Style
property.description: UI visual format of the selected item in Single Select mode

property.caption: Show Selected Avatar
property.description: Enable or disable showing avatar thumbnail for selected items in the input/tags

property.caption: Tag Badge Style
property.description: Select UI layout style of selected tags in Multi Select mode

property.caption: Tag Color (Hex/CSS)
property.description: Optional expression returning a dynamic color code or name to style tag badges individually (e.g. $currentObject/Color)

property.caption: Show Select All
property.description: Enable a button in multi-select mode to quickly select or deselect all items in the list.

property.defaultValue: เลือกทั้งหมด / Select All
property.caption: Select All Text
property.description: Label for Select All button.

property.defaultValue: ล้างทั้งหมด / Deselect All
property.caption: Deselect All Text
property.description: Label for Deselect All button.

property.caption: Create Option Text Template
property.description: Mendix expression for the create-option button label. Use '{value}' as a placeholder that will be replaced by the user's typed search query at runtime. You may embed entity attributes from the page context (e.g. '+ Add item to ' + $currentObject/CategoryName). Leave empty to hide the create button.

property.caption: On Change Action
property.description: Microflow, nanoflow, or action triggered when the selection changes.

property.caption: On Enter Action
property.description: Microflow, nanoflow, or action triggered when the widget receives focus.

property.caption: On Leave Action
property.description: Microflow, nanoflow, or action triggered when the widget loses focus.

property.caption: On Filter Input Change Action
property.description: Microflow, nanoflow, or action triggered when the search filter input text changes.

property.caption: Filter Input Attribute
property.description: Optional String attribute to store the current search filter query. This value is updated dynamically as the user types, before triggering On filter input change.

property.caption: Search Matching Method
property.description: The algorithm used to match user search query with option labels/subtitles.

property.caption: Case Sensitive Search
property.description: Enable case-sensitive matching for the search query.

property.caption: Search Debounce (ms)
property.description: Time to wait in milliseconds after the user stops typing before filtering lists (helps optimize database queries)

property.caption: Max Search Results
property.description: Limit the maximum number of matching items displayed in the dropdown at once. Set to 0 for unlimited (virtualized).

property.caption: ⚡ Weighted Search Ranking
property.description: [Secret Feature] Enable intelligent result ranking: Exact matches are shown first, followed by Starts-With, Word-Start, Contains, and Fuzzy matches. Produces far more intuitive search results.

property.caption: ♾️ Infinite Scroll (Lazy Load)
property.description: [Secret Feature] Enable lazy loading of the options datasource in 30-item chunks as the user scrolls down the dropdown. Significantly reduces initial load time for large entity lists.

property.caption: 🗄️ Client-Side Search Cache
property.description: [Secret Feature] Enable a 5-entry LRU (Least Recently Used) cache for search results. Re-typing a previously searched query returns results instantly without recomputing filters.

property.caption: Placeholder Text
property.description: Input box placeholder text

property.caption: Accent Color (Hex)
property.description: Accent theme color (e.g. Hex code: #3b82f6)

property.caption: Search Highlight Color
property.description: Optional Hex/CSS color code for matching search term highlight background. If empty, Accent Color is used.

property.caption: Border Radius
property.description: Corner roundness of input and popover (e.g., 16px, 8px, 0px)

property.caption: Background Blur
property.description: Glassmorphism backdrop-filter blur power (e.g., 16px, 8px, 0px)

property.caption: Dropdown Background Color
property.description: Background fill color of the popover dropdown (e.g., rgba(255,255,255,0.85), #ffffff)

property.caption: Max Dropdown Height
property.description: Maximum height of the dropdown panel (e.g., 250px, 300px)

property.caption: Dropdown List Layout
property.description: Layout structure of options in the list popover

property.caption: Option Avatar Shape
property.description: Geometric shape for dropdown and selected avatars

property.caption: Show Option Avatar
property.description: Enable or disable showing avatar thumbnail inside the options list dropdown

property.caption: Custom Option Content
property.description: Render custom Mendix widgets inside the dropdown options list for each item instead of standard avatar/label/subtitle.

property.caption: Show Checkbox/Radio Option
property.description: Show standard checkbox (multi) or radio button (single) next to dropdown list choices

property.caption: Hover Highlight Color Mode
property.description: Color scheme used when hovering over options

enumerationValues.enumerationValue: Dynamic Option Color (Uses Tag Color Expression if defined)

property.defaultValue: ไม่พบตัวเลือก / No options found
property.caption: No Options Alert
property.description: Text displayed when search results are empty

property.defaultValue: กำลังโหลด... / Loading...
property.caption: Loading Text
property.description: Message displayed while Mendix is fetching options

property.caption: Clear Button Accessibility Title
property.description: Help text announced when clearing selections

property.caption: Is Required
property.description: Enforce required-field checking inside the widget

property.caption: Validation Error Message
property.description: Custom alert text shown when required condition is violated

property.caption: Custom Validation Rule
property.description: Mendix expression that must return True for the selection to be valid

property.caption: Custom Validation Message
property.description: Alert text displayed when Custom Validation Rule evaluates to False
